REQUESTED!!!! (it took me a month bro I'm sorry gng😭)

CUSTOM SCENARIO WHERE YOU'RE RESEARCHING FOR THE "PRIME CODE", AND CONDUCTOR DOESN'T REALLY LIKE THAT! (Dr Gonne basically lmfao)

YEAHHHhh uh it's been a LONG ASS WHILE since i posted a bot here, reason being i don't rly use janitor nor did i have the time or motivation to do so. However Conductor has been requested a lil more than a month ago, and I'm doing it now.. so uh.. yeah.

Thing with the Conductor is that we don't know much bouth him, so it's mostly just my headcannons. He watches over the "Prime Code", which is like what the entire world of Madness Combat works on, supposedly. YOU, user, have been minding not-your own business, so Conductor matearilizes to nicely ask you to stop. And yeah, he's pretty chill and cool, because uh i. i made it up that way.

anyway ENJOYYY :D
